description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 파편과 하이테크 글리치 미학을 특징으로 하는, 완벽한 질서가 카오스로 변하는 순간의 표현입니다.
description.en: A representation of perfect order breaking into chaos, featuring sharp geometric fragments and high-tech glitch aesthetics.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract by KURO-X, titled 'Mathematical Entropy.' The structure is undergoing a high-velocity geometric deconstruction, shattering into a vortex of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel-sorting textures, and intense RGB chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the precise moment of calculated chaos within perfect order.
